features.name: token_pasting_in_macro_definition
features.description: Code should include a macro definition using the token-pasting operator to concatenate two macro arguments

features.name: token_pasting_prefix_with_macro_arg
features.description: Code should include a macro definition where a prefix string is concatenated with a macro argument using the token-pasting operator

features.name: token_pasting_macro_arg_with_suffix
features.description: Code should include a macro definition where a macro argument is concatenated with a suffix string using the token-pasting operator

features.name: token_pasting_between_macro_invocations
features.description: Code should include a macro definition where one macro invocation result is concatenated with another using the token-pasting operator

features.name: string_literal_with_escaped_quotes_in_macro
features.description: Code should include a macro definition that produces a string literal with escaped quotes
